summary: The user sought advice on cleaning and maintaining their white sneakers, which they wear every Sunday, and discussed their comfortable brown loafers worn to work daily the previous week. They decided to try the Sneaker Cleaner by Jason Markk and expressed interest in organizing their shoe rack and donating old shoes, including a pair of running shoes replaced recently.
facts: The user has been wearing their white sneakers every Sunday for the past month. The user wore their brown loafers to work every day from Tuesday to Friday last week. The user plans to try the Sneaker Cleaner by Jason Markk for their white sneakers. The user intends to start using a waterproofing spray on their shoes. The user has been thinking about organizing their shoe rack, which is getting cluttered. The user replaced their old running shoes with new ones purchased from Amazon on Monday. The user plans to donate their old running shoes.
